big_idea.core_concept: Professional-strength, cardiologist-formulated heart health supplements that deliver comprehensive cardiovascular support beyond what typical supplements offer
big_idea.unique_mechanism: Synergistic formulas with premium bioavailable forms (HydroQ-Sorb CoQ10, Cala Marine omega-3, Hydro Curc turmeric) at professional-strength doses
big_idea.proof_concept: 30-year legacy of Dr. Sinatra + clinical research + customer testimonials + quality certifications
big_idea.enemy: Inadequate supplement doses, poor bioavailability, single-ingredient approaches
big_idea.transformation_promise: From concerned about heart health to confident in comprehensive cardiovascular protection

testimonials.quote: PRO is the formula I now take every day, and I encourage my relatives to do the same due to our family history of cardiovascular concerns and statin usage. I started noticing that I felt more energetic than I used to in my day-to-day life.
testimonials.attribution: Steve F., Research & Development Director, The Dr. Sinatra Team
testimonials.result: More energy, family heart health support
testimonials.credibility: Internal team member with family history

testimonials.quote: I have been using Omega Q products since 2008 and also taking turmeric. So happy to finally have Omega Q Plus MAX all in one [product]. Omega Q has helped me keep my heart healthy, and my cholesterol levels in a normal range. I am strong and healthy at the age of 69.
testimonials.result: Heart health and healthy cholesterol at 69

testimonials.quote: I have been using Omega Q products for about 20 years. The last order was for Omega Q Plus ULTRA, and to date it has not been disappointing and my blood work has been very good.
I have been taking Dr. Sinatra products for over 15 yrs. Omega Q Plus Resveratrol and Turmeric gives real results. My blood work every 3 months is proof! I will never go without it again.
testimonials.result: Proven blood work results over 15 years
